fit_scope_conditions: Use as the first HX/cooler scalar response only after the model form is declared; fit on Salt2 only in this split; score Salt3 then Salt4 without refit.
forbidden_use: Do not impose fitted per-case cooler duty; do not tune cooler response on validation or holdout residuals.

fit_scope_conditions: Only one global or family-level eta_heater may be fitted, and only if heater/test-section terms remain separate.
forbidden_use: Do not absorb test-section or passive external heat loss into heater efficiency; no per-case eta.

fit_scope_conditions: Blocked until heater/test-section source-plus-loss contract exists; may be reported separately as a residual.
forbidden_use: Do not fit this simultaneously with heater efficiency on the current one-train-row split.

fit_scope_conditions: E0 bulk-drive replay may be scored as a diagnostic; E1/E2 wall-shell fitting is blocked until near-wall shell evidence is admitted.
forbidden_use: No per-case hA, no source/sink roles in passive hA, and no separate radiation term added to CFD realized wallHeatFlux.

fit_scope_conditions: Current effective HTC/Nu rows are postprocessed diagnostics and have zero fit-candidate control-volume rows after gates.
forbidden_use: Do not fit internal Nu or UA prime before thermal mesh/interface/admission gates clear.

fit_scope_conditions: Use as hydraulic score/gate after the forward solve predicts mdot.
forbidden_use: Do not use CFD mdot as runtime input or fit a thermal correction to hide pressure/hydraulic error.

fit_scope_conditions: Use as thermal score after fitted physical response variables are frozen.
forbidden_use: Do not fit thermal parameters directly to Tmean or loop delta on this split; use them to judge prediction quality.

fit_scope_conditions: Use as secondary scoring once TODO-PRED-SENSOR-MAP confirms or bounds coordinates.
forbidden_use: Do not fit any thermal correction to TP/TW sensors and do not use sensors as runtime anchors.

fit_scope_conditions: Use to keep hydraulic failure visible before thermal claims.
forbidden_use: Do not let thermal correction parameters compensate for pressure-root or friction failures.

fit_scope_conditions: After symmetric admitted +/- pairs exist, use them first as validation/holdout sensitivity scores around a frozen mainline model.
forbidden_use: Do not add perturbation-specific parameters; do not fit one side of a pair without the matching admitted counter-side.

fit_scope_conditions: After low-heat rows are requalified, admit first as low-heat validation/holdout for extrapolation from the mainline model.
forbidden_use: Do not train the initial HX or heater correction on low-heat rows before mainline model form is frozen.
